mapper.select: SELECT t1.tag_name , t1.tag_color , t1.tag_sort_order FROM sprout_tag t1 ORDER BY t2.tag_sort_order
SELECT t1.tag_id , t2.tag_name , t2.tag_color , t2.tag_sort_order FROM sprout_item_tag t1 LEFT JOIN sprout_tag t2 ON t1.tag_id = t2.tag_id WHERE t1.item_id = #{itemId} ORDER BY t2.tag_sort_order
